title: rosa alpina var. turbinata
intro: Rosa alpina var. turbinata is a lesser-known variant of the Rosa alpina species, a type of alpine rose that belongs to the family Rosaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Rosa alpina var. turbinata include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Rosa alpina var. turbinata can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to promote healing and well-being.
